'''KT-18''' (or "Kate") was a housekeeping [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that was purchased by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] at the [[Droidfest]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], intending to give it as a housewarming gift to his friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="ZtHR" />

At one point while cleaning outside Solo's [[Han Solo's sky house|sky house]], KT-18 fell off the platform, but was rescued by Skywalker in a [[Cloud car/Legends|cloud car]] before it collided with anything.

==Appearances==
*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]''
